name: Process creation
notes: 极高频查询词，SOC分析师最常查的Sysmon事件之一

name: A process changed a file creation time
notes: 常用于检测时间戳篡改(timestomping)

name: Network connection detected
notes: 高频查询，网络连接可见性核心事件

name: Sysmon service state changed
notes: 运维类，非攻击检测重点

name: Process terminated
notes: 常与Event 1配对做进程生命周期分析

name: Driver loaded
notes: 内核级检测关键事件，查询量中等

name: Image loaded (DLL/EXE)
notes: DLL劫持/侧加载检测相关，噪音较大需说明

name: CreateRemoteThread
notes: 经典代码注入检测事件，高价值查询

name: RawAccessRead
notes: 较冷门，反取证/直接磁盘读取检测

name: ProcessAccess
notes: LSASS凭据窃取检测核心事件，高价值查询

name: FileCreate
notes: 高频，文件落地检测基础事件

name: RegistryEvent (Object create/delete)
notes: 注册表持久化检测相关

name: RegistryEvent (Value Set)
notes: 注册表持久化检测相关，常与12/14一起讲解

name: RegistryEvent (Key/Value Rename)
notes: 较冷门

name: FileCreateStreamHash
notes: ADS(备用数据流)检测相关，较冷门但有专业价值

name: ServiceConfigurationChange (Sysmon config change)
notes: 检测Sysmon是否被篡改，安全运维视角很重要

name: PipeEvent - Pipe Created
notes: 命名管道横向移动/C2检测相关

name: PipeEvent - Pipe Connected
notes: 命名管道横向移动/C2检测相关

name: WmiEvent - WmiEventFilter activity detected
notes: WMI持久化检测，红队/APT常用手法

name: WmiEvent - WmiEventConsumer activity detected
notes: WMI持久化检测

name: WmiEvent - WmiEventConsumerToFilter activity detected
notes: WMI持久化检测

name: DNSEvent (DNS query)
notes: 高频，C2域名/DNS隧道检测核心事件

name: FileDelete (archived)
notes: 勒索软件/反取证检测相关

name: ClipboardChange
notes: 较新事件，隐私和数据泄露检测场景

name: ProcessTampering
notes: 进程镂空(process hollowing)检测，高级恶意软件相关

name: FileDeleteDetected
notes: 与23类似但不归档内容

name: FileBlockExecutable
notes: 较新版本功能，主动阻断场景

name: FileBlockShredding
notes: 较新版本功能

name: FileExecutableDetected
notes: 可执行文件落地检测，较新版本高价值功能

name: Sysmon service error report
notes: 故障排查用途，非攻击检测

name: An account was successfully logged on
notes: 全网最高频查询的Windows事件ID之一

name: An account failed to log on
notes: 全网最高频查询的Windows事件ID之一，暴力破解检测核心

name: An account was logged off
notes: 与4624配对分析会话时长

name: User initiated logoff
notes: 与4634区分用户主动/被动登出

name: A logon was attempted using explicit credentials
notes: 横向移动/凭据滥用检测经典事件

name: Special privileges assigned to new logon
notes: 特权账户登录检测，高价值

name: A Kerberos authentication ticket (TGT) was requested
notes: Kerberoasting/黄金票据检测相关，高价值

name: A Kerberos service ticket was requested
notes: Kerberoasting检测核心事件

name: A Kerberos service ticket was renewed
notes: 查询量较低

name: Kerberos pre-authentication failed
notes: AS-REP Roasting检测相关

name: The domain controller attempted to validate credentials (NTLM)
notes: NTLM认证失败/暴力破解检测高频事件

name: A session was reconnected to a Window Station
notes: RDP会话重连，较冷门

name: A session was disconnected from a Window Station
notes: RDP会话断开，较冷门

name: A new process has been created
notes: 全网最高频查询事件之一，进程创建监控核心

name: A process has exited
notes: 与4688配对分析

name: A service was installed in the system
notes: 持久化/横向移动检测经典事件(PsExec等)

name: A scheduled task was created
notes: 计划任务持久化检测高价值事件

name: A registry value was modified
notes: 需要SACL配置才能触发，注册表持久化检测

name: An attempt was made to access an object
notes: 文件/对象访问审计，配置和解读门槛较高，适合详细讲解

name: Permissions on an object were changed
A user account was created
notes: 账户创建检测高价值事件

name: An attempt was made to change an account's password
An attempt was made to reset an account's password
notes: 账户接管检测高价值事件

name: A member was added to a security-enabled global group
A member was removed from a security-enabled global group
A member was added to a security-enabled local group
notes: 权限提升检测高价值事件(常见于加入Administrators组)

name: A member was removed from a security-enabled local group
A security-enabled local group was changed
A user account was changed
notes: 高频，账户属性变更检测

name: A user account was locked out
notes: 高频，账户锁定/暴力破解相关

name: A member was added to a security-enabled universal group
The audit log was cleared
notes: 极高价值，攻击者清理痕迹的经典信号

name: System audit policy was changed
notes: 高价值，审计策略被篡改的信号

name: Auditing settings on object were changed
The system time was changed
notes: 反取证/时间戳篡改相关

name: A network share object was accessed
notes: 高频，横向移动/数据渗出检测

name: A network share object was checked for access
notes: 比5140更详细但更嘈杂

name: PowerShell Module Logging
notes: 高价值，PowerShell攻击链检测基础

name: PowerShell Script Block Logging
notes: 全网高频查询，恶意PowerShell脚本检测核心事件

name: Windows is starting up
notes: 基础系统事件，查询量低但适合做完整性收录

name: Windows is shutting down
notes: 同上

name: An authentication package has been loaded by the LSA
A trusted logon process has been registered with the LSA
A notification package has been loaded by the SAM
Administrator recovered system from CrashOnAuditFail
notes: 官方Appendix L标注Medium

name: A replay attack was detected
notes: 官方Appendix L标注High，查询量中等但内容专业性强

name: SIDs were filtered
notes: 官方Appendix L标注Medium

name: Backup of data protection master key was attempted
Recovery of data protection master key was attempted
A new trust was created to a domain
notes: 域信任关系相关，域渗透场景高价值

name: Encrypted data recovery policy was changed
The audit policy (SACL) on an object was changed
SID History was added to an account
notes: 官方标注High，域权限维持高级攻击手法

name: An attempt to add SID History to an account failed
notes: 官方标注High

name: ACL was set on accounts in administrators groups
notes: 官方标注Medium

name: An attempt was made to set the Directory Services Restore Mode
notes: 官方标注High，DSRM密码修改是知名域控后门手法

name: Special groups have been assigned to a new logon
notes: 官方标注High

name: Windows Firewall Service unable to retrieve security policy
Windows Firewall Service unable to parse new security policy
The Windows Firewall Service failed to start
notes: 防火墙被禁用相关，攻击前兆信号

name: The Windows Firewall Driver failed to start
Code integrity determined image hash is not valid
notes: 文件完整性/篡改检测

name: Credential Manager credentials were backed up
notes: 凭据窃取相关场景

name: Credential Manager credentials were restored from backup
Netlogon denied a vulnerable secure channel connection (machine)
notes: Zerologon相关的现代高价值事件

name: Netlogon denied a vulnerable secure channel connection (trust)
notes: Zerologon相关的现代高价值事件

name: Errors occurred while processing security policy in GPOs
